excerpt: Thy breath has risen from thy breath, O Ḥusayn! The heat of thy pulse remains ever efficacious, O Ḥusayn! Thou hast guided us unto the pinnacle of understanding
The question of Nature and Water presents itself before thee. Thy perseverance hath emerged with the same intensity, even as the secret of the oath of allegiance to thee remaineth steadfast
Thy murderer is the murderer of the Prophet of Islam; thy blood is verily the blood of the Prophet himself, O Ḥusayn! Every government shall fall in this world until the Day of Judgment
